last_cycle_summary: Validated initialized V1 coordination files, confirmed status JSON parses, checked public docs for unsafe readiness/legal-advice overclaims, and tightened launch sequencing so feature implementation waits on Architecture / Contracts.
tests_run: rg -n "production|legal advice|replace|autonomous|private pilot|private-pilot|external model|sensitive" README* docs .agentops
blockers: Architecture / Contracts must publish shared V1 schemas, deterministic fixtures, module boundaries, and status schema before feature implementation windows launch.
integration_risks: Feature windows must not independently redefine shared V1 schemas or private replacement models.
README and release docs should remain truthful about private-pilot readiness.
next_actions: Start V1 Architecture/Contracts thread as the next blocking dependency.
Publish canonical V1 contract shapes, fixtures, module boundaries, and status schema.
Launch Document Retrieval, LLM Runtime, and Gate Engine only after Architecture / Contracts baseline is available.
